prompt: Create a 4x3 grid collage corresponding to the 12 months of the year. The theme is souvenir photos of the character traveling in different countries. In each photo, the clothing must match the country's characteristics and the climate of that month. Use different poses in each panel (front, back, side, full body, half body) and different expressions (smile, funny, exaggerated). The photos should have an outdoor photography aesthetic, fashion editorial quality, clean composition, and beautiful visuals.
